package.name: soft_robot_controllers
package.description: ros_control controller plugins for the KUKA RSI soft force control system (spec sections 5.3, 7, 10, 12.1): ForceComplianceController (admittance pipeline over the SRI wrench) and CartesianCorrectionController (stream passthrough + RKorr goal mode hosting OrientationMotionCore). Pure-logic cores are ROS-free and fully covered by offline gtests.
